# GLMU Consulting — Gianluigi Mucciolo

> Sovereign cloud architect & enterprise AI advisor. I help organizations design, build, and operate secure cloud-native platforms with AI capabilities at their core.

## Who I Am

**Gianluigi Mucciolo** — independent consultant at GLMU Consulting, based in Italy. I work hands-on with engineering teams to design cloud architectures, modernize platforms, and embed AI into production systems. My focus is on **sovereign infrastructure** (EU data residency, regulatory compliance) and **enterprise-grade AI enablement**.

## Credentials

| Certification | Issuer |
|---|---|
| Professional Cloud Architect | Google Cloud |
| AI & ML Engineer (AAI) | AWS |
| Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) | CNCF |
| Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD) | CNCF |
| Terraform Associate | HashiCorp |

## Core Competencies

- **Cloud Architecture** — multi-cloud (GCP, AWS), landing zones, network design, IAM, cost optimization
- **Kubernetes & Containers** — cluster design, operators, GitOps (Flux/ArgoCD), service mesh, security policies
- **AI/ML Platforms** — MLOps pipelines, model serving (KServe, vLLM), RAG architectures, LLM orchestration
- **Infrastructure as Code** — Terraform, Pulumi, Crossplane, policy-as-code (OPA, Kyverno)
- **Platform Engineering** — internal developer platforms (IDPs), Backstage, CNCF ecosystem, golden paths
- **Enterprise Enablement** — technical workshops, team coaching, architecture reviews, migration roadmaps

## Services

- **Architecture Design** — cloud-native and AI system design, trade-off analysis, decision records
- **Platform Build** — end-to-end implementation of Kubernetes platforms, AI infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines
- **Team Enablement** — hands-on coaching, workshops, internal developer platform adoption
- **Review & Audit** — architecture reviews, security posture assessments, cost reviews, incident post-mortems

## Engagement Model

- Short-term: architecture reviews, advisory calls, technical assessments (1–5 days)
- Medium-term: platform builds, migrations, AI enablement programs (2–12 weeks)
- Retainer: fractional cloud architect, ongoing advisory (monthly)

## Site Structure (glmu.cc)

- Single-page site with sections: hero → identity → competencies → credentials → scope → contact
- Contact form (client-side validation, no backend — simulated submit)
- VAT modal with hardcoded public registry data
- Built with React 19 + TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vite 6
